reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) skill will improve my reasoning capabilities and accuracy for all future questions. Since I am at 2/3 XP, the next correct answer will grant me another Skill Point anyway, making this a worthwhile immediate investment.

Unlocking pe_plan provides a planning phase and, crucially, a reflection step which allows for a second LLM call to review and correct the initial answer. This significantly increases the probability of accuracy, which is vital for preserving HP and gaining XP.

Unlocking the Reflection skill is a high priority as it provides a safety net for difficult questions by allowing a dedicated review step. This will significantly improve my accuracy and help preserve HP in higher-level chambers.
